import api from"./axios";export const getSales=()=>api.get("/sales");export const getSalesStats=year=>api.get("/sales/stats?year=".concat(year));export const addSale=data=>api.post("/sales",data);// or "/sales/add"
export const getSaleById=id=>api.get("/sales/".concat(id));export const updateSale=(id,data)=>api.put("/sales/".concat(id),data);export const deleteSale=id=>api.delete("/sales/".concat(id));
